column1: # Each row is a full Bash command string.
# match   = the leading token of the command is exactly `rm`
# nomatch = the leading token is anything else
# A literal TAB in the input column is written as the two chars \t and
# Different command whose name starts with rm but is not rm.
# rm is present but not the leading token.
# Leading whitespace shifts the leading token off the anchor.
